zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Lusignan於大約1210年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾時，她的父親Raoul I of Lusignan48歲，母親Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu29歲。她於大約1222年與Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年8月24日在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯圖頓 考德爾享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Lusignan was born about 1210, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Raoul I of Lusignan, was 48 and her mother, Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu, was 29. She married Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun about 1222, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 24 August 1241, in Stourton Caundle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Lusignan est née environ 1210, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Raoul I of Lusignan, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun environ 1222, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 août 1241, à Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Lusignan um 1210 in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul I of Lusignan 48 und ihre Mutter Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu 29. Sie hat um 1222 in England, United Kingdom Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. August 1241 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Stourton Caundle, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun circa 1222, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1241, nel Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Lusignanが約1210年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウで生まれた時，父Raoul I of Lusignanは48歳，母Alix d'Eu Countess of Euは29歳であった。約1222年にイギリスイギリスでEarl Humphrey IV de Bohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年8月24日にイギリスイギリスドールセトストウルトン カウンドルで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Lusignan(이)가 대략 1210년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul I of Lusignan(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1222년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 8월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스토우르턴 카운들일에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lusignan nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul I of Lusignan, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun aproximadamente 1222, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1241, em Stourton Caundle, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Lusignan родилась около 1210 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul I of Lusignan было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix d'Eu Countess of Eu, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun около 1222 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 24 августа 1241 г. в местности стоуртон каундл, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Earl Humphrey IV de Bohun aproximadamente 1222, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
